title: Wizardry delight
description: Wizardy delight addon mod for Farmer's delight.
body:
![WD - preview](https://i.postimg.cc/7LB281Yn/Logo-2.png)

The addon will add a touch of magic and allow the player to enter the role of a magician obsessed with cooking - a kind of Radagast, but only living in the kitchen in a log cabin, not on an old withered tree, and with a frying pan in his hands instead of a magic staff. We don't like monotony, so we expanded the fauna in the overworld and in the nether, slightly increased the importance of robber outposts in the development of the player.
